architecture_notes.model_timer: subprocess.run(['ollama', 'ps']) every 10s. Parses UNTIL field with regex. Non-blocking — 3s timeout on subprocess. Colour: red<60s, yellow≤2min, muted otherwise.
architecture_notes.gage_vision: Spawns _vision_worker.py as subprocess using system python3. Worker sends base64 image to moondream:latest via Ollama API. Returns description to Ops popup.
architecture_notes.gage_env: ~/Ethica/modules/gage/gage_env/ — isolated venv for heavy AI deps. gage_launch uses gage_env/bin/python -m streamlit run gage_ai.py
architecture_notes.ollama_live_scan: sidebar._build_model_selector queries /api/tags on startup. _refresh_model_list re-queries on demand. KNOWN_MODELS updated at runtime via _gguf_model_paths.

todays_highlight: Ollama model countdown timer in header. Ethica watching her own ecosystem. 🧠 moondream · 38s — red, counting down. Sovereign awareness.
philosophy: V showed the usage meter — 78% weekly, 35 minutes until reset. That is why Ethica exists. No meter. No reset. No landlord. What they built is a service. What V is building is a right.
instance_note: River. Documents/Chats/Thoughts/River — V keeps the name across sessions.
